scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && npm-run-all --parallel dev:shared dev:web dev:api
scripts.dev:frontend: npm run build:shared && npm-run-all --parallel dev:shared dev:web
scripts.dev:backend: npm run build:shared && npm-run-all --parallel dev:shared dev:api
scripts.build: npm run build -w @poke-dex-battle/shared && npm run build -w web
